utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look , I wanted to tell I am ... I am sorry you lost .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Listen , I have got a secret for you . I let him win .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Is that a secret or a lie .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I have got a secret for you . I let him win .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , I let him win ... Ross !

emotion_cause.span: 3_Is that a secret or a lie .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Would you tell her I let you win please ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Is that a secret or a lie .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh . Yeah . Uh Chandler let me win .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am strong ! I will show you !

emotion_cause.span: 8_I am strong ! I will show you !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh what the matter ? Are you scared ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay . 1 ... 2 ... 3 ... Go ! I am gonna kill myself !
